overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a tropical beach at sunset. The character moves from shallow water onto white sand and passes under a massive ancient stone arch covered in vegetation, with futuristic ruins visible in the distance against a purple and orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline with shallow water

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water along the beach toward the sandy shore

entered.detail: clear shallow ocean water with gentle waves lapping at the shore
white sand shoreline stretching along the coast
steep rocky cliff face covered in dense tropical vegetation
waterfall cascading down the cliff face into the ocean
tropical palm trees lining the edge of the beach

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character wading through shallow turquoise water along a tropical beach. A waterfall cascades down the cliff face in the distance while palm trees line the shore, all bathed in warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach approaching massive stone arch

events.description: character exits shallow water and steps onto dry sand

agents.ego_description: walking onto the sandy beach toward the massive arch structure ahead

entered.detail: large curved ancient stone structure covered in vegetation spanning across the beach
dark jagged rock formation on the right side of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to dry sand and continues walking toward an enormous stone arch that dominates the horizon. The beach stretches ahead with rocky outcrops on the right and the massive ancient structure growing larger as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath the massive curved stone arch

events.description: character walks underneath the massive stone arch structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the arch while the camera tilts upward to reveal the structure overhead

entered.detail: futuristic angular metallic structures visible beyond the arch against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character passes directly underneath the massive stone arch, which blocks part of the sky overhead. The camera tilts up to show the ancient structure's details and vegetation, while futuristic ruins become visible in the distance beyond the arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with distant ruins and palm trees

events.description: character exits from under the arch into open beach area with view of distant structures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach toward palm trees and distant ruins with smoke visible on the horizon

entered.detail: reddish smoke rising in the distance beyond the palm trees indicating fire or activity

segments.scene_description: Having passed the arch, the character continues along the open beach toward a cluster of palm trees. Futuristic ruins stand prominently on the right while reddish smoke rises in the distant center, suggesting activity or fire ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a tropical coastline that transitions from a serene waterfront to a landscape of ancient and futuristic ruins. It begins with the character wading through shallow turquoise water beneath the glow of golden hour light, with a distant waterfall cascading down a cliff face. As the character moves from the water onto dry sand, the camera tracks forward toward an enormous stone arch that gradually dominates the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character passes directly underneath the massive, vegetation-covered structure, with the camera tilting upward to reveal the arch's scale before uncovering futuristic ruins in the distance. Finally, the view opens up across the beach toward a cluster of palm trees and prominent ruins, while reddish smoke rises on the distant horizon.
